CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Continued To Apr-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT IKE PELESEUMA'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-06-2015 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT IKE PELESEUMA'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is continued to February 25, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 6, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
